title: Reactive Primitives
description: Signals, effects, and memos make components respond to change.
signals_intro: A signal is a reactive value. It returns a getter and setter pair. Reading the getter inside an effect registers a dependency. The effect re-runs when the signal changes.
effects_intro: Effects run side effects when their dependencies change. CReact tracks which signals are read inside the effect function.
info_batched_effects: Effects are queued and batched. Multiple signal updates in a single synchronous block only trigger one effect re-run.
memos_intro: A memo is a derived reactive value. It caches the result and only recomputes when its dependencies change.
batching_intro: batch() groups multiple signal updates into a single re-evaluation pass:
untrack_intro: untrack() reads a signal without creating a dependency:
